items.name: AWS Builder Center Now Offers Free Sandbox Environments
items.summary: AWS Builder Center now lets builders request free, time-limited sandbox environments directly from eligible workshops, eliminating the need for a personal AWS account, credit card, or concerns about unexpected charges

items.summary: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports OpenLineage compatible data lineage in IAM-based domains, capturing lineage events from Apache Spark jobs run on Amazon EMR, AWS Glue, SageMaker Visual ETL, and notebooks.
